text: I stand in a space of glass and illumination, where the geometry is precise and everything feels carefully chosen. The purple and blue lights radiate a sense of energy and curiosity—an invitation to explore. As I cross into the R+D area, I sense a hum of innovation, but also a quiet tension. The wall’s text speaks of being watched and hiding, and I can’t help but notice my own awareness sharpen in response. I feel simultaneously on display and introspective, surrounded by evidence of thoughtful creation, asking myself how I fit in this interplay of presence and absence.
